title: pharbitis sessiliflora
intro: Pharbitis sessiliflora, also known as the hairy pharbitis or hairy moonseed, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the morning glory family (Convolvulaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Pharbitis sessiliflora can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications for its therapeutic properties.
